The '''Wahl mansion''', which was owned by [[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] [[Wahl]], was one of the nicest buildings in [[Hedrett]]. It was the only residence in either Hedrett or [[Gadrin]] that stood over two stories tall. It had well-tended grounds and [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]] watched the property. The Wahls had a doorsperson dressed in a red uniform to greet visitors.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within}}
